# Chijun Sima — Personal Academic Homepage

> ML systems researcher at Tencent (WeChat). Research on efficient AI systems, model freshness, recommender systems, and LLM serving. Co-first author, OSDI 2022 (Ekko). LLVM developer with commit access.

## Quick facts

- Name: Chijun Sima
- Affiliation: Tencent (WeChat), Senior Software Development Engineer
- Location: Guangzhou, China
- Research areas: Efficient AI systems (MLSys), system–algorithm co-design, model freshness, recommender systems, LLM serving, KV-cache management
- Education: B.Eng. Computer Science, South China University of Technology (GPA 3.85/4.00, Rank 1/28)
- LLVM developer with commit access (since 2018)

## Selected publications

1. **[OSDI 2022]** Ekko: A Large-Scale Deep Learning Recommender System with Low-Latency Model Update
   Chijun Sima*, Yao Fu*, Man-Kit Sit, Liyi Guo, Xuri Gong, Feng Lin, Junyu Wu, Yongsheng Li, Haidong Rong, Pierre-Louis Aublin, Luo Mai
   (* = co-first author)
   URL: https://www.usenix.org/conference/osdi22/presentation/sima

2. **[IEEE Access 2019]** Dynamic Barycenter Averaging Kernel in RBF Networks for Time Series Classification
   Kejian Shi, Hongyang Qin, Chijun Sima, Sen Li, Lifeng Shen, Qianli Ma

## Ekko key results

- WAN bandwidth reduced by 92%
- Machine cost reduced by 49%
- 2.4s model-update latency
- 10,000x model-size scaling
- Deployed in WeChat recommendation, serves 1B+ users daily

## Academic service

- Reviewer: CVPR 2025, ICLR 2025 Workshop (FM-Wild), NeurIPS 2025 Workshop (Efficient Reasoning)
